channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Many people urinating on building walls, 2nd May
item.description:
Today there have been many people urinating in several corners on Kingsford Row and Forbes Lane. They seemed quite desperate and this is because there are not enough toilets at the nearby Hackney Bridge as there is a big event there today.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsford Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped NO2 Cannisters, 2nd May
item.description:
Approx 15 No2 canisters and box dumped at where footpath meets Old Rd (Opposite Gas Works) Please can they be cleared up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Old Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car involved in a RTA, 2nd May
item.description:
Car has been moved from having an accident and has been dumped - it’s no fit state and could potentially be leaking oil

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morris Drive, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inadequate public waste provision near Tesco / Mossbourne Riverside Or sharper: Recurring litter near Tesco / Mossbourne due to inadequate bin capacity, 2nd May
item.description:
Recurring litter/overflowing waste near Tesco, especially at weekends. Existing bin capacity is inadequate for public footfall from Tesco, QEOP and local venues. Please review public waste provision, cleansing frequency and coordination with EWS/RMG.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tandy Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture and food waste, 2nd May
item.description:
The same problem everyday. Zero sanction and zero vigilance from the council.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Cambridge Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox and cat, 2nd May
item.description:
Outside number 25 and 27 cherry tree walk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Cherry Tree Walk, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 2nd May
item.description:
Deals Gateway Remove flypostrrring from traffic light control box by bus turnaround

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deals Gateway, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 2nd May
item.description:
Deals Gateway by the bus turn around. Remove flypostering from traffic light control box by Bus turn round

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deals Gateway, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 2nd May
item.description:
Deals Gateway Remove flyposterinv from Cable box by bus turn around

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deals Gateway, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime hire bikes left abandoned on overcrowded, 2nd May
item.description:
High Vulome of lime hire bikes left abandoned on overcrowded parking bay on Haymarket Street opposite Cafe Concerto.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Haymarket, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 55 Mawbey House Old Kent Road, 2nd May
item.description:
Consistent fly tipping going on for 6 months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere. Every week., 2nd May
item.description:
Outside no.78 & 78a. People drop their bin bags here every week. Then the foxes tear it apart & spread the rubbish around. This part of the road has no street lights so it will continue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benares Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full and blowing up onto the mound, 2nd May
item.description:
Bin overflowing. Please can you also clean up the mound next to the bin. I know you say it’s TFL land but the bin is Hackney and it blew from there. Thanks!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypodtering, 2nd May
item.description:
Deptford Bridge outside Deptford Dlr Station Remove flypostering from lamppost colunnn lllDG002

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deals Gateway, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 2nd May
item.description:
Outside Deptford Dlr Station . Remove flypostering from direction sign posts

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes piling up, 2nd May
item.description:
The boxes are piling up and blocking the pavement. It’s becoming difficult to access the Bike hanger. Please collect thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various bags or rubbish and random items., 2nd May
item.description:
Pile of various items in street. Also several rubbish bags a few feet away opposite nisa shop. Ripped open, contents including surgical gloves spread over street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandond Forests hire bike Bikes parked dangerously, 2nd May
item.description:
Abandond Forests hire bike Bikes parked dangerously the pavement. Swiss court TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Leicester Square, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous, 2nd May
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24A, Newport Court, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unauthorised persistent parking, 2nd May
item.description:
Unauthorised persistent parking

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garrick Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
